heroVariantB.title: Engineered Technical Textiles for Coating, Lamination & Performance

banner.title: About Us
banner.subtitle: From regional textile specialist to integrated materials and coatings partner

journeySection.title: How Nirbhay Is Evolving
journeySection.storyTitle: From textile manufacturer to integrated materials and coatings partner
paragraphs: Nirbhay Knitting Industries Pvt. Ltd. operates from Halol near Vadodara in Gujarat, India. The company has built a reputation on full in-house production and testing for knitted fabrics, vinyl coating applications, and customer-specific industrial requirements — with fast delivery and customization as key competitive advantages.

Today, Nirbhay's growth is driven by broader product development, sustainable processing, and vertical integration through coating, laminating, and the representation of Interplast Kimya (Turkey). That shift — combined with innovations in coated 3D fabrics, FR textiles, and water-based breathable coatings — is expanding the company into an innovation-driven niche player with a strong sustainability profile aligned with European and North American market expectations.

milestones.title: Knitted fabrics and coated textile support
milestones.description: Core manufacturing centered on knitted fabrics, vinyl coating support, and industrial application know-how.

milestones.title: In-house testing capability
milestones.description: Quality control and customer-specific validation became central to the company's operating model.

milestones.title: Interplast Kimya represented
milestones.description: PU resins and lacquers strengthened vertical integration and cross-selling potential.

milestones.title: New fabric categories launched
milestones.description: 3D spacer fabrics, raised fabrics, and recycled-yarn developments broadened the offer.

milestones.title: Coating and innovation pipeline expands
milestones.description: Laminating, PU coating, coated 3D materials, FR trials, and breathable coatings define the current direction.

story.title: Built for industrial performance, positioned for international growth
paragraphs: Nirbhay combines 125 MT/month manufacturing capability, coating support, and testing discipline for applications where consistency and customization matter. Its portfolio spans knitted base fabrics, 3D spacer fabrics, raised fabrics, recycled yarn fabrics, vinyl coated textiles, and value-added coating services — with FR fabrics and breathable coatings in active development.

The company is now pushing into higher-value material systems through laminating, PU coating, Interplast Kimya-linked chemistry, and a focused innovation pipeline. International expansion is underway — with Europe as the first target market for sustainability-aligned technical textiles, followed by North America for innovation-driven coated materials, and Japan/Korea for high-tech niche applications.

banner.title: Sustainability
banner.subtitle: Responsible process choices built into manufacturing
banner.description: Nirbhay's sustainability direction is grounded in water-free finishing, certified zero discharge operations, efficient utilities, reduced chemical footprint, and lower-impact product development.

intro.title: How we approach responsible manufacturing
paragraphs: Nirbhay's sustainability profile comes from practical operating choices: all finishing processes are water free, the facility follows a zero discharge model, and core energy inputs are limited to electricity and gas. These decisions reduce process complexity while supporting cleaner production discipline.

The product roadmap also reflects this direction. Recycled yarn fabric options are already part of the portfolio, while new development work focuses on lower-footprint coating systems, coated 3D materials, and water-based breathable solutions for the future.

pillars.title: Zero Discharge Facility
pillars.description: Manufacturing is positioned around zero discharge operations, giving customers a stronger sustainability story and better alignment with international expectations.

pillars.title: Water-Free Finishing
pillars.description: All finishing processes are water free, reducing water dependency and helping simplify environmental process management.

pillars.title: Efficient Utility Profile
pillars.description: The facility runs on electricity and gas only, supporting a more controlled and efficient production setup.

pillars.title: Lower-Impact Product Development
pillars.description: Recycled yarn fabrics, future water-based coatings, and cleaner finishing choices are part of a broader move toward more responsible material innovation.

pillars.title: Reduced Chemical Footprint
pillars.description: Through the Interplast Kimya partnership and focused R&D in water-based breathable coatings, Nirbhay is actively reducing chemical intensity across its coating and finishing operations.

stats.label: Primary energy inputs: electricity and gas
